sizing_rule.note: Multiply constrained portfolio weights by Lagrangian multiplier ratio (λ1_unconstrained / λ1_constrained) to scale up positions and match geometric return of unconstrained optimal portfolio. Example: 0.245694 / 0.128 = 1.9195 multiplier.

source_rule_text: Scale constrained portfolio weights by the Lagrangian multiplier ratio to achieve the same geometric return as the unconstrained optimal portfolio.
